name: high_vol_alternating
description: Period-2 alternating returns of +/- 0.05 (i.e., +/- 5%) across 20 days. 50x the amplitude of the low-vol fixture; expected vol is 50x. This pair (low + high) verifies the function is approximately linear in amplitude, which is a property a wrong (e.g., squared or clamped) impl would violate.
